description: A world rule that validates the world graph.

description.description: The rule to enforce, expressed in story-world terms

severity.description: INFO — suggestion only. WARNING — flags issue. ERROR — must resolve.

scope.description: What this rule applies to. Omit for global rules.

examples.name: Every character knows at least one other character
examples.description: Every character must have at least one relationship with another character.

examples.name: Magic users can hold at most 3 spells
examples.description: No person may hold more than three spells at any given time.

examples.name: Undead cannot exist before the Great War
examples.description: The undead do not exist in the world before the Great War.
